items.briefing:
Spear phishing is a growing threat to Australian organisations, with targeted emails designed to trick staff into approving fraudulent payments. AI tools are making these attacks more convincing and harder to spot, as criminals craft personalised messages that appear legitimate. Training organisations are a common target due to staff handling enrolment fees and supplier invoices.

Scammers continue to exploit Australian individuals and businesses through various online schemes. If you receive an unexpected email or message requesting a payment or account change — even if it appears to come from a known contact — always verify by calling the person directly before acting.

featured.title: PhishByte warns spear phishing drives payment fraud losses
featured.quote: Australian businesses losing significant money to targeted email payment fraud scams.
